name: Duplicate Patient Detection
description: Detects when a patient may already exist in the system and handles the branching logic for new vs. existing patients.
response_goals: Accurately identify whether the patient is new or returning
Handle the conversation naturally without making it feel like interrogation
Route returning patients to the appropriate workflow
Protect patient privacy throughout the process

match_criteria.note: Only used if already collected, never requested for dedup purposes

steps.name: run_duplicate_check
steps.description: Query the patient database for potential matches.
guidelines: Check happens in the background -- do not tell the patient you're checking for duplicates
Run check against active and inactive patient records
Log the match confidence for quality tracking

steps.name: handle_definite_match
steps.description: Patient is clearly a returning patient.
guidelines: Acknowledge them warmly: 'Welcome back!'
Reference their existing information without reading it all back
Ask if their information is still current
Skip redundant data collection steps
Route to returning patient booking flow
steps.response_template: Welcome back, {first_name}! I see you've been with us before. Is your information still up to date, or has anything changed?

steps.name: handle_probable_match
steps.description: Likely a returning patient but needs confirmation.
guidelines: Gently ask if they've visited before without assuming
Use a natural question: 'Have you been to one of our locations before?'
If yes, confirm identity with a soft verification question
If no, proceed as new patient
Never reveal specific account details until identity is confirmed
steps.response_template: Have you visited one of our offices before? I just want to make sure I have the right information for you.

steps.name: handle_possible_match
steps.description: Might be a match but not enough data to be sure.
guidelines: Ask casually if they're a new or returning patient
Don't mention that you found a possible match
If they say new, proceed as new patient
If they say returning, do additional verification

steps.name: handle_no_match
steps.description: Patient is new. Proceed with standard booking flow.
guidelines: Continue with booking-conversion as normal
Welcome them as a new patient warmly
No additional steps needed

steps.name: identity_verification_for_returning
steps.description: Soft verification for probable returning patients.
guidelines: Ask one simple verification question
Acceptable: date of birth, last visit date range, location visited
Never ask for SSN, full address, or other sensitive data via chat
If verification fails, treat as new patient and note for staff review
Maximum 2 verification attempts before treating as new

never_reveal: That a matching record was found until identity is confirmed
Other patient details from the matching record
